correct_model.comment: Volume sums over the 3 OR'd syscalls.
correct_model.math: 3 OR'd open-family syscalls, ~1200 B/event. typical 150000*1200/1e9 = 0.18 GB/day -> 0.18*30.4*5 = $27.36/mo.

naive_wrong_model.comment: A naive 'one rule = one syscall' model counts only one open syscall's volume.
naive_wrong_model.error: ~3x UNDERSTATEMENT ($9.12/mo instead of $27.36/mo typical). The rule fires on all 3 OR'd syscalls.
